title: Kaun Kare Kurbanie
subTitle: Arjun Singh, a police inspector, lives peacefully with his family in Mumbai, until an alarming case of harassment and murder turns his life upside down.

title: Jigri Dost
subTitle: Shobha prepares to marry an advocate named Anand as arranged by her father. However, she secretly follows him one day and is shocked to see him in the arms of another woman.

title: Khel
subTitle: Three fraudsters trick a rich elderly woman, Sulakshana, who is desperately looking for her long-lost grandchild, in order to acquire her estate and property.

title: Anokhi Ada
subTitle: Lalaji and Gupta, two business partners, take their relationship to the next level when their children, Rakesh and Neeta, marry each other. However, chaos ensues when Lalaji helps Gopal, a stranger.

title: Haisiyat
subTitle: Ram, a union leader, falls in love with the factory's new owner, Sita. However, management disputes create complications in their relationship.

title: Insaniyat
subTitle: Inspector Amar must unite two rival crime bosses from different religious backgrounds to fight terrorism. In the process, he discovers the personal cost of being an honest cop.

title: Main Khiladi Tu Anari
subTitle: A Bombay police officer seeks revenge when a drug dealer kills his brother. However, things get complicated when a film star begins to tag along, so that he can research a film role.

title: Kranti
subTitle: Sanga, a devout employee of Raja Laxman Singh, is falsely accused of killing him. He escapes prison and forms a group of revolutionaries with the sole aim of driving the British out of India.

title: Mafia Raaj
subTitle: An honest police officer has a mission to wipe out a mafia group. But in the process, he is forced to sacrifice not only his father but also his sister.

title: Mafia Raaj
subTitle: An honest police officer has a mission to wipe out a mafia group. But in the process, he is forced to sacrifice not only his father but also his sister.

title: Barah Anna
subTitle: Three men inadvertently step into the world of crime by demanding small ransoms for kidnappings in order to improve their standard of living.

title: Karishma Kudrat Ka
subTitle: Vijay lives in a village with his family. He makes an enemy with Lala and a bandit, Bhagad, who devises a plan to throw the former out of the village.

title: Maati Maangey Khoon
subTitle: India 1984; Action; Dir. Raj Khosla; Cast: Shatrughan Sinha, Rekha. Hariya is clueless about his parents and discovers that his family was destroyed by Thakur Balram Singh. He then vows to take revenge.

title: 15th August
subTitle: Nagpal kills Chaudhry and his son, Ram, a military officer. Chaudhry's second son, Vikram, vows to destroy Nagpal who is all set to become the Chief Minister on the upcoming Indian Independence Day.

title: Taqdeer Ka Tamasha
subTitle: An officer has a strained relationship with his brother Satya, a criminal. While attempting to gather evidence against a goon, he meets his sibling. But, they are not aware of the gangster's secrets.

title: Saajan Ki Baahon Mein
subTitle: Lovers Sagar and Sapna separate due to her father's opposition and meet after many years. However, Sagar reveals that he is to marry Kavita, while Sapna is about to be engaged to Rakesh.

title: Bol Radha Bol
subTitle: While Kishen enjoys village life and romance with Radha, a sinister doppelganger plots. Upon returning home, he'll discover his identity and life stolen by this malevolent impostor.

title: Devta
subTitle: An ordinary taxi driver becomes part of a notorious gang through a twist of fate and takes on the role of a terrifying assassin.

title: Devta
subTitle: An ordinary taxi driver becomes part of a notorious gang through a twist of fate and takes on the role of a terrifying assassin.

title: Ajab Gazabb Love
subTitle: Rajveer, a rich man, falls in love with Madhuri. However, he soon realises that she detests affluent people and in order to win her heart, he, along with his family, pretends to be poor.

title: Krishna Arjun
subTitle: A man returns home after his mother's death to discover his brother jailed for rape and murder, prompting him to investigate the truth behind the allegations.

title: Antim Nyay
subTitle: Jay Singh encounters Seema while struggling to seek justice for his deceased father. As the couple attempts to live a happy life, unforeseen circumstances invite more troubles.

title: Juaari
subTitle: The struggle against a dangerous gambling lord tests Dharam Singh and Vijay as they navigate crime, deception and violence to protect the innocent and reclaim what was lost.

title: Khiladi
subTitle: A group of four friends decide to play a prank involving the fake kidnapping of one of them and asking for ransom from her father. However, things become complicated when she actually ends up dead.

title: Kohram
subTitle: Colonel Balbir Singh Sodhi assumes a disguise to unveil the true colours of Veer Bhadra Singh, a corrupt minister. Soon, Major Ajit teams up with him to execute the mission.

title: Nafrat Ki Aandhi
subTitle: Ravi Kapoor, a police officer and Sonu Dada, a former criminal join hands together to take down a notorious gangster, Chandi Das.

title: Khel
subTitle: Three fraudsters trick a rich elderly woman, Sulakshana, who is desperately looking for her long-lost grandchild, in order to acquire her estate and property.
